title: ononis spinescens
intro: Ononis spinescens, also known as Spiny Restharrow, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its spiny stems and leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, and may also have antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Ononis spinescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support the treatment of various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
